codeReview.summary: The feature fixes many contract/wiring gaps (status alias, nested map routes, domain/work gate checks, malformed mode, connect layout/sidebar state, pipeline init persistence), but mock build-mode traceability linkage is broken by incorrect file path normalization.

issues.description: In `:mock` mode, `files_written` is converted to project-root-relative paths (`output/vN/types.ts`). `Bropilot.Traceability.AutoLinker` resolves non-absolute paths against `output_dir` (`lib/bropilot/traceability/auto_linker.ex:294`), yielding non-existent paths like `<output_dir>/output/vN/types.ts`, so links are filtered out. This breaks deterministic mock codegen runs for traceability linkage expectations (e.g., VAL-CROSS-031-style flows).

sharedStateObservations.observation: `integration-worker` requires agent-browser verification when UI changes are made, but this worker session made UI changes without agent-browser evidence while `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` remained true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md:22 and :41 require agent-browser; handoff verification for this feature lists only `commandsRun` with no interactive/browser checks (handoff JSON line 14 onward), and transcript skeleton contains no `agent-browser` usage.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture library appears stale about ER visualization status and can mislead future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:69 says 'ER diagram page remains pending', but this feature adds ER rendering/explorer UI in `web/src/pages/domain.astro` (ER Diagram section and Mermaid rendering code).

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit diff for misc-fixes-1. Most intended fixes are present, but there is one blocking regression: mock build mode produces file paths incompatible with AutoLinker path resolution, causing traceability links to be dropped.
